positive: A minimalist, stylish illustration featuring a group of stylized, interconnected mountain peaks viewed through a crescent moon and subtle shooting stars. The design utilizes a limited color palette of deep indigo, muted teal, and warm gold leaf accents, set against a clean white background. The style should be geometric and ethereal, reminiscent of modern celestial map artwork. Focus on clean, bold silhouettes and strong negative space for perfect print visibility. Use a composition that is highly centered and balanced, suitable for apparel printing. Vector art quality, clean line work, high contrast.
